stream_samples.text: github actions runner cold-start back to 90s+ on linux-x64-large again. our CI budget is screaming.
Copilot suggestion latency in our Bazel monorepo went from ~400ms to 2.5s after the v3 model rollout. unusable.
[#9215 P1] Enterprise SAML token refresh failing intermittently for Okta-federated orgs since 04/22
Code search returning 6-month-old results for actively-edited files. Indexing lag must be huge right now.
actions/cache@v4 silently fails when ZSTD compression level is auto on Windows runners — degrades to no cache
copilot completions triggering on plain comments inside .env files. that's... not great for security.
Runner provisioning queue depth past 8k for hosted-large pool, p99 wait time crossed 4min for 90 consecutive minutes
Audit log streaming to Splunk gaps for ~12min during peak hours daily. compliance team is asking questions.
REST API: list-pull-requests with state=closed returns paginated results that silently re-include open PRs
github copilot workspace's plan-mode is actually good for refactor PRs. pleasantly surprised.
[alert] runner_cold_start_p95 SLO breach 3rd day running, > 75s threshold on linux-x64-large
Anyone else find the new repo sidebar layout buries the Insights tab? minor, but breaks muscle memory.
Codespaces port-forwarding URL randomly invalidates mid-session, especially on long-lived devcontainers
[ci-runners] cold-start regression traced to v25.4 image bake — node_modules cache layer not being reused

clusters.title: Copilot latency on monorepos post v3 model
Code search index lag on hot files
Audit log streaming gaps to enterprise SIEMs

top_epic.title: Restore Actions runner cold-start to sub-30s on hosted-large
top_epic.rationale: 1,980 signals across X, HN, GitHub Issues and Datadog point to the v25.4 runner image bake regressing the node_modules cache layer reuse — cold-start p95 is sitting above 75s for 3 days running, breaching SLO. Customers on hosted-large pools are watching CI budgets balloon.
top_epic.verdict: Platform-critical — every minute of cold-start is billed against customers' CI budgets.
top_epic.recommendation: Roll back the v25.4 image, fix the cache layer, and ship with regression tests for layer-reuse before re-rolling.
acceptance_criteria: Cold-start p95 on linux-x64-large back to < 30s for 7 consecutive days
node_modules cache layer reuse rate > 95% in CI metrics
Image-bake CI gate that fails on layer-reuse regression
Runner provisioning queue depth alarm threshold lowered to 2k
